# Figure description: 2_Карта_фактов_M-42-VIII.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/M-42-VIII/2_Карта_фактов_M-42-VIII.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **factual materials map** (Карта фактического материала — "Map of Factual Material"), which is a standard Soviet-era geological survey document showing the spatial distribution of all data collection points and survey lines used in a regional geological-geophysical investigation. It is essentially a **data coverage/index map** at 1:200,000 scale, documenting where physical measurements, boreholes, and geophysical traverses were conducted.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The map covers **sheet M-42-VIII** of the standard Soviet topographic nomenclature grid at 1:200,000 scale, located in **northern Kazakhstan** (Казахская ССР). The survey was conducted by the **Центрально-Казахстанское геолого-производственное объединение** (Central Kazakhstan Geological Production Association) under the **Министерство геологии Казахской ССР** (Ministry of Geology of the Kazakh SSR). The map was compiled in **1984** (dated top-left: "1984г") and is designated **Чертёж №46** (Drawing No. 46). The repository stamp indicates it belongs to the **Казахская ССР Республиканский геологический фонд**, inventory number **16572** (consistent with Report 36572 referenced in the context). The map covers an area approximately 80 × 80 km based on the 1:200,000 scale with a 2 km bar scale shown.

---

## Key Content

The map displays the locations and identifiers of **all data collection points and geophysical survey lines** used during the regional survey. Key elements include:

### Boreholes/Wells (скважины):
Numerous drilling points are marked with **circles** (both open circles ○ and filled/circled dots ⊙), each labeled with alphanumeric identifiers. Several distinct series are visible:
- **Ж- series** (e.g., Ж-33, Ж-197, Ж-289, Ж-290, Ж-291, Ж-292, Ж-300, Ж-306, Ж-330, Ж-335, Ж-338, Ж-355, Ж-387, Ж-448, Ж-500, Ж-533, Ж-575, Ж-633, Ж-638) — densely clustered in the **western and southwestern portions** of the map
- **М- series** (e.g., М-7, М-8, М-10, М-15, М-16, М-18, М-22, М-31, М-41, М-45, М-103, М-104, М-108, М-109, М-110, М-112, М-1003, М-1005, М-1007, М-1041, М-1043, М-1047) — distributed across the **central and southern portions**
- **Н- series** (e.g., Н-6, Н-7, Н-8, Н-12, Н-13, Н-15, Н-17, Н-18, Н-19, Н-20, Н-21, Н-22, Н-23, Н-24, Н-25, Н-26, Н-27, Н-28, Н-29, Н-30, Н-31, Н-980, Н-981, Н-982, Н-986, Н-1010, Н-1018, Н-1019, Н-1020, Н-1021, Н-1024, Н-1025, Н-1028, Н-1029, Н-1033, Н-1034, Н-1035, Н-1036, Н-1037, Н-1038, Н-1039, Н-1040, Н-1046, Н-1047, Н-1048, Н-1050, Н-1053, Н-1055, Н-1651, Н-1652, Н-1653, Н-1654, Н-1655, Н-1656, Н-1657, Н-1658, Н-1659) — concentrated in the **south-central region**, likely representing a dense drilling campaign
- **Ч- series** (e.g., Ч-7, Ч-12, Ч-15, Ч-16, Ч-17, Ч-19, Ч-20, Ч-21, Ч-22, Ч-23, Ч-24, Ч-25, Ч-132/508, Ч-444/441) — scattered in the **north-central area**
- **К- series** (e.g., К-191, К-197, К-253, К-289, К-300, К-306, К-360) — northwestern corner
- **Т- series** (e.g., Т-1, Т-10А, Т-14А) — southwestern area
- **О- series** (e.g., О-Г-1, О-Г-3, О-Г-5, О-Г-11) — southwestern corner
- **Ф- series** (Ф-ГСП-ЖО noted as a labeled traverse line in the central portion)

### Geophysical Survey Lines (профили):
Multiple **dashed diagonal lines** traverse the map, representing seismic, gravity, or magnetic survey profiles. These are labeled with names such as:
- **Профиль** (Profile) designations with route numbers
- Lines appear to run predominantly in **NW-SE and NE-SW orientations**, forming a roughly diagonal grid pattern across the entire sheet
- Several lines are labeled with what appear to be traverse/line identifiers

### Numeric Point Identifiers:
Hundreds of **4–5 digit numbers** (e.g., 8205, 8154, 8071, 9035, 7612, 8160, 9169, 2440, 4773, 7542, 9138, 4921, 9107, etc
